metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Mambu domain, centered on composable banking, lending, partner enablement, and regulated control.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productExperience: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience now carries only experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that experience.

experiences.name: Configure Products Fast
experiences.description: Help banking product teams configure and launch new propositions without heavy engineering effort.

flows.title: Configure Products Fast
flows.description: Help banking product teams configure and launch new propositions without heavy engineering effort.

steps.title: Create banking product
keyFacts: This step determines how quickly users reach initial value.
It often combines setup effort, policy choices, and correctness checks.
painPoints: Users stall when setup asks for too much context too early.
Errors here create rework and reduce confidence in the product model.

dependencies.name: Product Configuration Engine
dependencies.description: Enables teams to model and evolve banking products through configuration rather than code-heavy core changes.
dependencies.how: Uses Product Configuration Engine for enables teams to model and evolve banking products through configuration rather than code-heavy core changes in create banking product.

steps.title: Reuse approved template
keyFacts: Reuse approved template is a meaningful step in the bank operator experience flow.
Users need clear guidance and feedback here to keep moving forward.
painPoints: Users drop out when reuse approved template feels fragmented across channels.
Confidence decreases when the product does not explain what happens next.

experiences.name: Originate a Loan Smoothly
experiences.description: Help lending teams move customers from application to decision with better pricing and workflow support.

flows.title: Originate a Loan Smoothly
flows.description: Help lending teams move customers from application to decision with better pricing and workflow support.

steps.title: Start loan application
keyFacts: This step converts intent into a real transaction or commitment.
Trust, clarity, and feedback matter more here than feature breadth.
painPoints: Users hesitate when they do not trust the outcome, price, or handoff.
Small friction at this point creates disproportionate conversion loss.

dependencies.description: Coordinates application intake, status progression, and decision outcomes across direct and partner channels.
